name: Soft Tacos with East L.a. Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lean pork butt or shoulder, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the meat in lard for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally to brown evenly.
2. Reduce heat, cover, and cook for an additional 30 minutes.
3. To make guacamole, mash avocados and blend with minced onion, garlic powder, salt, pepper, and lemon juice. Fold in chopped tomatoes. Set aside.
4. Drain the meat and shred it (about 1 1/2 cups).
5. Heat tortillas on a griddle or skillet until pliable.
6. Spread guacamole on each tortilla.
7. Top with some shredded pork mixture, some of the onion-cilantro mixture, and lemon juice.
8. Roll up and serve with additional lemon wedges.
